introSection: Vertical Roller Coaster is a Jinma Rides Vertical Roller Coaster at Great Xingdong Tourist World.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 6 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Vertical Roller Coaster is a Jinma Rides Vertical Roller Coaster at Great Xingdong Tourist World.

4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 6 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.
